nextSteps: Build for macOS: build_macos({ workspacePath: "example_projects/iOS_Calculator/CalculatorApp.xcworkspace", scheme: "CalculatorApp" })

Build and run on iOS Simulator (default for run intent): build_run_sim({ workspacePath: "example_projects/iOS_Calculator/CalculatorApp.xcworkspace", scheme: "CalculatorApp", simulatorName: "iPhone 17" })
Build for iOS Simulator (compile-only): build_sim({ workspacePath: "example_projects/iOS_Calculator/CalculatorApp.xcworkspace", scheme: "CalculatorApp", simulatorName: "iPhone 17" })
Show build settings: show_build_settings({ workspacePath: "example_projects/iOS_Calculator/CalculatorApp.xcworkspace", scheme: "CalculatorApp" })
